title: GapOptimizer
description: GapOptimized improves the use of golden apples, allowing you to eat them without interruption, while being designed for a smooth PvP experience with a lightweight and clean client
body:
Improve your PvP experience with GapOptimizer. This mod allows you to eat golden apples (normal or enchanted) without the eating animation getting canceled when you open your inventory, eat faster, and remove attack delay.

✨ Features
✅ Seamless Eating: Continue eating your golden apple smoothly even while managing your inventory.
📦 Inventory While Eating: Open your inventory at any time while eating a golden apple and keep eating without interruption.
⚡ Faster Eating: Consume golden apples quicker than vanilla for better survivability.
⚔️ No Attack Delay: Remove the cooldown between hits to maximize your DPS in PvP.
💎 Versatile: Works with both standard Golden Apples and Enchanted Golden Apples.
🚀 Lightweight: Client-side only, minimal performance impact.

❓ Support & Suggestions
Found a bug? Have a feature request? Feel free to reach out!
Discord: smootth

📥 Installation
1. Download the latest version.
2. Place the .jar file in your mods folder.
3. Ensure you are running Fabric for Minecraft 1.21.8.

---
Made for smoother and faster PvP gameplay.

TeneChozos forever ❤️
